_source: Planetfall pp.76-79, Campaign Armory + Weapon Traits + Grunt Upgrades
_description: All weapons by tier (standard, tier_1, tier_2) plus grunt upgrades. Tier 1 requires Advanced Manufacturing Plant built. Tier 2 requires High-Tech Manufacturing Plant built.
_notes: Some weapons function differently from similarly-named weapons in other 5X games. Class restrictions: Civilian (all except grunts), Scout, Trooper, Grunt, Scientist.

weapons.name: Colonial Shotgun
weapons.description: Shotguns inflict significant damage at close range.

weapons.name: Colony Rifle
weapons.description: Mass produced semi-automatic rifle for self-defense and hunting.

weapons.name: Scout Pistol
weapons.description: Long barrel, stabilized handgun used by the explorer service.

weapons.name: Infantry Rifle
weapons.description: Standard Unity automatic rifle. Renowned for ruggedness.

weapons.name: Light Machine Gun
weapons.description: Automatic weapon with bipod. 1 per fireteam of 3+.

weapons.name: Trooper Rifle
weapons.description: High precision military rifle with Slammer armor piercing ammunition.

weapons.name: Assault Gun
weapons.description: Support weapon fired from arm or hip mounted attachment.

weapons.name: Flame Projector
weapons.description: Stream of burning chemicals. A favorite for bug hunting.

weapons.name: Shard Pistol
weapons.description: Fires a hail of microscopic shrapnel.

weapons.name: Ripper Pistol
weapons.description: Needle-based modification of the Scout pistol.

weapons.name: Kill-Break Shotgun
weapons.description: Massive shotgun firing a gravity-charged slug.

weapons.name: Carver Blade
weapons.description: Heavy cutting blade for hand-to-hand combat. Brawling only.

weapons.name: Bio-Gun
weapons.description: Genetically targeted area of effect bio-weapon.

weapons.name: Mind-Link Pistol
weapons.description: Bio-linked to the mind. Roll to hit using Savvy.

weapons.name: Phase Rifle
weapons.description: Ammunition can phase through minor obstacles.

weapons.name: Dart Pistol
weapons.description: Bio-flechettes that penetrate almost any protection.

ap_ammo.name: AP Ammo
ap_ammo.description: If stationary, the shooter may add +1 to damage.

area.name: Area
area.description: Select a target point in range and sight. Each enemy within 2" is hit on D6 4+. Cover provides no protection.

civilian.name: Civilian
civilian.description: Open to all classes except grunts.

critical.name: Critical
critical.description: A natural 6 to hit inflicts 2 hits on the target.

cumbersome.name: Cumbersome
cumbersome.description: Range reduced to 12" when moving and firing.

flexible.name: Flexible
flexible.description: A character with this weapon can carry a handgun at the same time.

focused.name: Focused
focused.description: Both shots must be fired at the same target.

hail_of_fire.name: Hail of Fire
hail_of_fire.description: If all shots aimed at same target, 4 shots may be fired.

hyperfire.name: Hyperfire
hyperfire.description: If a hit does not destroy the target, fire again. Continue until miss or destroyed.

knockback.name: Knockback
knockback.description: A target that survives a hit is knocked Sprawling.

melee.name: Melee
melee.description: +2 bonus when used as brawling weapon.

mind_link.name: Mind-Link
mind_link.description: Roll to hit using Savvy instead of Combat Skill. Scientists roll twice and pick best.

phased_fire.name: Phased Fire
phased_fire.description: Target receives no benefits from cover or scatter terrain. Must be visible.

stabilized.name: Stabilized
stabilized.description: If the shooter does not move, +1 to hit.

stream.name: Stream
stream.description: Draw 6" long, 1" wide line from firer. Any figure touched is hit automatically.

grunt_upgrades.name: Sharpshooter Sight
grunt_upgrades.description: One grunt per fireteam may have a gun sight (+1 to hit when stationary). Military rifle only.

grunt_upgrades.name: Adapted Armor
grunt_upgrades.description: All grunts receive a 6+ Saving Throw.

grunt_upgrades.name: Bolstered Survival Kit
grunt_upgrades.description: Post-mission grunt survival: only a roll of 1 is a permanent casualty.

grunt_upgrades.name: Ammo Packs
grunt_upgrades.description: Once per battle, roll an extra die to hit for every grunt in the fireteam.

grunt_upgrades.name: Side Arms
grunt_upgrades.description: All grunts carry a handgun in addition to normal weapons.

grunt_upgrades.name: Sergeant Weaponry
grunt_upgrades.description: One grunt per fireteam receives a Damage +1 Melee weapon.
